title: Golden Brown Norwegian Cheese Pasta
description: A light Norwegian dish featuring a charred, cheese-pull pasta with a hint of granulated sugar, cooked to perfection in a papillote, and finished with a Mediterranean twist.
instructions: Cook the pappardelle pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked pasta to the bowl and toss to combine with the garlic oil mixture.
In a separate bowl, mix together the norwegian cheese and granulated sugar.
Add the cheese mixture to the pasta and toss until the cheese is well combined.
Transfer the pasta mixture to a large piece of parchment paper, leaving a 1 inch border around the edges.
Top the pasta with the halved cherry tomatoes and chopped fresh basil.
Fold the parchment paper over the pasta to create a papillote, and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the pasta from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
